description: Create a two-column content slide on risk management skill priorities, with headline and explanatory text on the left and a horizontal bar chart of prioritized skill sets on the right.

header.headline: Skill priorities – adaptability and digital acumen lead
header.sub: Figure 14: Over the next three years, what are the top skill sets your organization believes risk management resources should prioritize to better manage risk?

left.body: CROs are prioritizing a targeted set of capabilities to keep pace with a more technology-driven risk environment. Adaptability (66%) and digital acumen (55%) lead, alongside continued emphasis on soft skills and an understanding of the business – reflecting a shift toward more strategic risk partnering as automation expands.

series.label: Ability to adapt to a changing risk environment
Digital acumen (e.g., technology, data, AI, programming)
Soft skills (e.g., leadership, relationship building, communication, negotiation, active teaming)
Understanding of the business and products
Deeper specialization in at least one domain (e.g., credit, cyber)
Governance and documentation capabilities to satisfy internal and regulatory requirements and expectations
Knowledge of agile development or innovation methods
